summary: Iteration 61: AI Workflow Builder Template Gallery - All features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified all Template Gallery features: (1) GET /api/step-documents/templates returns 8 templates with all required fields, (2) Each template shows: country flag, label, steps count, docs count, government fees, workflow steps, assessment bodies, official government URL, (3) 'Use This Template' button loads template into review view with all documents via POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-bulk, (4) Review view shows fee calculator card with government fee breakdown, editable steps with documents and mandatory badges, (5) 'Save as Product' button present, (6) 'Custom AI Workflow' button navigates to builder with country/service selection, (7) Search bar filters templates by name (client-side).

template_required_fields.details: Each template has: id, label, steps, total_documents, fees_info, government_url, assessment_bodies

canada_pr_template.details: 6 steps, 20 docs, CAD fees, canada.ca URL, WES/IQAS/CES/ICAS/PEBC assessment bodies

australia_pr_template.details: 5 steps, 21 docs, AUD fees, homeaffairs.gov.au URL, VETASSESS/ACS/Engineers Australia

uk_skilled_worker_template.details: 3 steps, 10 docs, GBP fees, gov.uk URL

usa_h1b_template.details: 3 steps, 15 docs, USD fees, uscis.gov URL, USCIS/DOL/SEVP

uae_golden_visa_template.details: 3 steps, 12 docs, AED fees, u.ae URL, ICP/GDRFA

singapore_ep_template.details: 3 steps, 13 docs, SGD fees, mom.gov.sg URL, MOM/COMPASS

nz_skilled_migrant_template.details: 4 steps, 14 docs, NZD fees, immigration.govt.nz URL, NZQA

gallery_view_ui.details: 8 template cards displayed with country flags, fees, steps, assessment bodies

use_this_template_button.details: Loads template into review view with all documents

review_view_fee_calculator.details: Shows 'Government Fees Breakdown' card with currency-specific fees

review_view_editable_steps.details: Shows steps with documents, Required/Optional badges, descriptions

save_as_product_button.details: 'Save as Product' button present in review view

custom_ai_workflow_button.details: Navigates to builder with country select, service input, custom instructions

search_bar_filter.details: Filters templates by name (searching 'Canada' shows 1 card)

official_government_source_links.details: 7 templates have 'Official Government Source' links (Student Visa generic doesn't have one)

gallery_view.hero_section: AI Workflow Builder hero with description and Custom AI Workflow button
gallery_view.template_cards: 8 cards with country flags, labels, steps/docs counts, fees, workflow steps, assessment bodies

review_view.header: Product name, description, steps count, documents count, Edit button
review_view.fee_calculator: Government Fees Breakdown card with currency-specific fees
review_view.workflow_steps: Expandable steps with documents, Required/Optional badges
review_view.action_buttons: Save as Product, Regenerate, Templates buttons

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
